source.description: Checked-in archived refusal-smoke result fixture for deterministic reference/Core builds.

sampling.notes: Single checked-in archived refusal result artefact; no runtime sampling; deterministic by construction.

evaluation.notes: Reference summary must require exact canonical success tokens and zero failures/errors.

pii_handling.notes: Reference fixture only; must not contain live user data or recoverable PII.

extensions.notes: Checked-in refusal reference manifest anchoring deterministic Core buildout to an archived result fixture.
